scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install && npx prisma generate --schema=src/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma db push --schema=src/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push --schema=src/prisma/schema.prisma
